institution.name: RV Institute of Technology and Management

metrics.name: Effective implementation of Curriculum
metrics.description: The institution ensures effective curriculum delivery through structured teaching plans

metrics.name: Number of Certificate/Value Added courses
metrics.description: Percentage of students enrolled in Certificate/Value added courses

metrics.name: Student Enrolment Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of students enrolled against sanctioned intake
metrics.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(*) AS enrolled, 480 AS sanctioned_intake, ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / 480, 1) AS enrollment_pct FROM students

metrics.name: Student-Full time Teacher Ratio
metrics.sqlQuery: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students) AS students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'FACULTY') AS faculty, ROUND((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students)::numeric / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'FACULTY'), 0), 1) AS ratio

metrics.name: Full-time teachers with PhD
metrics.description: Percentage of full-time teachers with PhD/D.Sc./D.Litt.

metrics.name: Internal Assessment Mechanism
metrics.description: Mechanism of internal assessment is transparent and robust
metrics.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_usn) AS students_assessed, COUNT(DISTINCT subject_code) AS subjects_assessed, ROUND(AVG(marks_obtained * 100.0 / NULLIF(max_marks, 0)), 1) AS avg_score_pct, COUNT(*) AS total_assessments FROM internal_marks WHERE test_type IN ('IA1','IA2','IA3')

metrics.name: Pass Percentage of Students
metrics.description: Pass percentage of students in final year University Examination

metrics.name: Research Grants Received
metrics.description: Grants received from government and non-government bodies for research

metrics.name: Number of PhD students registered
metrics.description: Number of PhD scholars registered per eligible teacher

metrics.name: Physical Infrastructure
metrics.description: Availability and utilisation of physical, academic and support facilities

metrics.name: Students Benefited by Scholarships
metrics.description: Percentage of students benefited by scholarships and freeships
metrics.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT usn) AS scholarship_students, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students) AS total_students, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT usn) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students), 0), 1) AS pct FROM fee_items WHERE component ILIKE '%scholarship%'

metrics.name: Student-Parent Engagement
metrics.description: Percentage of students whose parents were engaged via institutional outreach
metrics.sqlQuery: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT student_usn) AS students_contacted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students) AS total, ROUND(COUNT(DISTINCT student_usn) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students), 0), 1) AS engagement_pct, COUNT(*) AS total_calls, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE outcome IN ('COMPLETED','ANSWERED')) AS answered_calls FROM ai_call_logs WHERE called_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days'
metrics.edaiNote: Voice calls to parents serve as documented parent-engagement evidence for this metric

metrics.name: Student Placement Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of placement of outgoing students

metrics.name: Alumni Engagement
metrics.description: There is a registered Alumni Association contributing to institutional development

metrics.name: E-Governance Implementation
metrics.description: Implementation of e-governance in areas of operation
metrics.sqlQuery: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document_requests WHERE status = 'APPROVED' AND requested_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days') AS digital_docs_issued, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ai_call_logs WHERE called_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '365 days') AS automated_calls, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fee_items WHERE status = 'PAID') AS digital_payments
metrics.edaiNote: EdAI itself is the e-governance evidence — document generation, voice calls, fee tracking, and attendance system all count toward this metric

metrics.name: Effective Welfare Measures
metrics.description: The institution has effective welfare measures for teaching and non-teaching staff

metrics.name: Internal and External Financial Audits
metrics.description: Strategies for mobilisation and optimal utilisation of resources and financial management
metrics.sqlQuery: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_fees_billed, SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PAID') AS total_fees_collected, ROUND(SUM(amount) FILTER (WHERE status = 'PAID') * 100.0 / NULLIF(SUM(amount), 0), 1) AS collection_rate FROM fee_items WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)

metrics.name: Measures for gender equity
metrics.description: Measures initiated by the institution for the promotion of gender equity

metrics.name: Institutional Distinctiveness
metrics.description: Portray the performance of the institution in one area distinctive to its vision, priority and thrust
